query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Nifty Outlook for July 23: Oil prices continue to play bummer as supports break
articles.description: For now, the Nifty bulls would be hoping that with 24,000 on the verge of being decisively broken, 23,800 is a level that is now the most important support on the downside. Chartists have warned that a break of 23,800 could lead to a further fall towards 23,600 levels on the downside.

articles.title: Oil prices rise another 2%, while AI stocks get back to falling
articles.description: AI stocks are turning back lower and weighing on Wall Street

articles.title: Gasoline price rise: Iran war worsened the pain, but the bottleneck began years ago
articles.description: Gas prices may rise as Middle East hostilities resume, but the situation is complex. The widening crack spread, driven by reduced refining capacity from conflicts, impacts gasoline prices more than crude oil costs alone, potentially affecting both consumers and stock markets.

articles.title: Blockade of Bab el-Mandeb to push up crude oil prices, threaten product supply, lift freight rates
articles.description: The Houthi blockade of Bab el-Mandeb threatens crude oil supply, increases prices, and raises freight costs for Asian refiners.

articles.title: Trump to rally in Michigan's Oakland County as early voting opens in key primary
articles.description: Rising gas prices, an unpopular war in Iran, and auto industry tariffs have fueled Republican concerns in Michigan ahead of the state's Aug. 4 primary.

articles.title: RBI sold $6 billion in May to defend oil-hit Indian rupee, data shows
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India sold $6.1 billion in foreign exchange during May. This intervention occurred as oil prices surged, pushing the rupee to a record low. The central bank also implemented policy measures to encourage dollar inflows into India.

articles.title: Chip companies and other AI winners drag Wall Street lower again, while crude oil prices rise
articles.description: Stocks of computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are turning back lower and dragging Wall Street with them

articles.title: India's central bank sold $6 billion in May to defend oil-hit rupee, data shows
articles.description: The Reserve Bank of India sold a net $6.1 billion in the foreign exchange market in May, data released on Wednesday showed, as a sharp ​rise in oil prices due to the Iran war pushed the rupee ‌to an all-time low.

articles.title: Will Tropical Storm Bertha Reach Texas Or Raise Gas Prices?
articles.description: A mid-week update on Tropical Storm Bertha, its march towards Texas, and potential impacts on gas prices.

articles.title: Tech Stocks Tumble as Investors Brace for Big Earnings
articles.description: U.S. stocks are poised to open lower as chip stocks weaken and investors await Big Tech earnings. The focus is on Alphabet and Tesla's results for insights into AI investments. Geopolitical tensions and oil prices add to market uncertainty, while the Fed is expected to hold interest rates steady.
